warnings: KEY DUMMY-GRID CROSS-CHECK FOLLOW-UP (reporting only, master file not edited): this detail sheet's own dimension chains directly reproduce the room sequence and dimensions already found on the ground floor plan (หน้า06) and confirmed via the 2.05m offset on multiple elevations/sections (รูปด้าน 2, รูปตัด 1) -- พักผ่อน (+0.60, north of B), เฉลียง (+0.50, between B and A, spanning the full B-A 1.80m grid interval), and ทางเดิน (+0.20, south of A, extending into the 'Aprime' dummy-grid zone at -2.05m). This CONCLUSIVELY confirms ST.1 is the small entrance-step sequence connecting these 3 levels (+0.20 -> +0.50 -> +0.60), not a carport/terrace slab as originally speculated from the structural beam plan alone -- the strongest single piece of evidence yet for resolving the master gridline file's provisional 'Aprime' note.

One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the section view _view2_st1_section.json, which shows the actual riser heights (2 steps of 0.15m each, totaling the 0.30m level difference between +0.20 and +0.50).
This sheet is A-18 (not A-19 as in house #4) since this house has only 2 sections (A-11, A-12) instead of 3, shifting every later sheet number down by 1.
